'''banate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:paganly|paganly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-n-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:paganly|paganly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| banate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:banate|banate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:banatesher|banatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:banatesherĂ«m|banatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:banatero|banatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:banateshĂ«|banateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:banateshĂ«m|banateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibanatero|gokibanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibanateshĂ«|gokibanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibanateshĂ«m|gokibanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobanankerom|gobanankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobanankeshĂ«|gobanankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobanankeshĂ«m|gobanankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobanankeya|gobanankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:banaterom|banaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:banatemu|banatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:banateya|banateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibanaterom|gokibanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibanatemu|gokibanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibanateya|gokibanateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:bananate|bananate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bananatesher|bananatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bananatesherĂ«m|bananatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bananatero|bananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bananateshĂ«|bananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bananateshĂ«m|bananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibananatero|gokibananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibananateshĂ«|gokibananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibananateshĂ«m|gokibananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobananankerom|gobananankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobananankeshĂ«|gobananankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobananankeshĂ«m|gobananankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobananankeya|gobananankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bananaterom|bananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bananatemu|bananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bananateya|bananateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibananaterom|gokibananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibananatemu|gokibananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibananateya|gokibananateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:bĂŠnĂŠte|bĂŠnĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bĂŠnĂŠtesher|bĂŠnĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m|bĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠnĂŠtero|bĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|bĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|bĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠnĂŠtero|gokibĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|gokibĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|gokibĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobĂŠnĂŠnkerom|gobĂŠnĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«|gobĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gobĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobĂŠnĂŠnkeya|gobĂŠnĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠnĂŠterom|bĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠnĂŠtemu|bĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bĂŠnĂŠteya|bĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠnĂŠterom|gokibĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠnĂŠtemu|gokibĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibĂŠnĂŠteya|gokibĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:bafnafte|bafnafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bafnaftesher|bafnaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafnaftesherĂ«m|bafnaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafnaftero|bafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bafnafteshĂ«|bafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafnafteshĂ«m|bafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafnaftero|gokibafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibafnafteshĂ«|gokibafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafnafteshĂ«m|gokibafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobafnafnkerom|gobafnafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobafnafnkeshĂ«|gobafnafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobafnafnkeshĂ«m|gobafnafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobafnafnkeya|gobafnafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafnafterom|bafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafnaftemu|bafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bafnafteya|bafnafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafnafterom|gokibafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafnaftemu|gokibafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibafnafteya|gokibafnafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
